channel.title: Authors on Maciej Skuratowski
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on Maciej Skuratowski

item.description: Bio I am a Microsoft Certified Professional and Full Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience. I have consulted for many clients, providing guidance on various software projects. These days I work mainly with Microsoft Azure and Web Development (ASP.NET Core and Angular 2+, VueJs), architecting solutions around PaaS, Azure Functions, App Service, Azure Cosmos DB, IoT and many other Azure services. I am big fan of clean & scalable architectures, micro-services, cloud infrastructure, and innovative edge technologies and best practices during engineer works.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Nam odio justo, interdum eu ex sit amet, rhoncus interdum magna. Nullam at magna tempor, suscipit ipsum ac, egestas tellus. Maecenas non orci ut velit consectetur feugiat. Proin dignissim ullamcorper eros, at commodo orci eleifend at. Donec luctus diam et interdum finibus. Nullam vel elit hendrerit, aliquet massa eget, vestibulum arcu. Etiam fermentum, sem in interdum scelerisque, massa risus rhoncus turpis, quis efficitur nibh dolor vel dolor.
